title: Sustained High Memory Usage During Enrollment
description: Detects when memory usage stays above 90% across at least 3 performance snapshots during enrollment, indicating sustained memory pressure that can cause app installation failures or system instability.
explanation: Memory usage exceeded 90% in at least 3 performance snapshots during this enrollment — sustained pressure, not a single transient spike. Persistent high memory usage can cause app installation failures, system slowdowns, and ESP timeouts, especially on devices with 8 GB RAM installing several apps concurrently.

remediation.title: Reduce memory pressure
steps: Review which apps are being installed concurrently during ESP
Check minimum RAM requirements for the device (8 GB recommended)
Investigate if background services are consuming excessive memory
